objective: Resolve opencodex PRs #89 and #90 end-to-end on dev + land pending user-approved v2 effort-cap gating worktree changes. WP1: verify+commit pending changes (responses.ts v2 gating, Dashboard v2-only panel+help, i18n en/ko/zh/de, effort-policy v2 gating tests). WP2: PR #90 hosted image_generation conflict strip — adversarial verify vs dev, integrate with author credit, gates green, push, PR comment + close/merge. WP3: PR #89 /v1/alpha/search relay — adversarial verify (timeout semantics, provider selection, buffering, sidecar, request-log), integrate with author credit + fix commits, gates green, push, PR comment + close/merge. Evidence: devlog/260711_pr_89_90_integration/, bun test 0 fail, tsc clean, gui build clean.
